message:
feat(beads): add comprehensive CBOR test bead (bd-3pii)

- Created TEST: fcp-cbor Unit Tests bead
- Covers schema hash determinism and versioning
- Covers canonical serialization (deterministic, map key ordering)
- Covers schema prefix verification in serialized output
- Covers roundtrip serialization/deserialization
- Covers RFC 8949 integer encoding (smallest form)
- Covers ObjectId computation (blake3-based)
- Includes golden vector specifications
- Includes JSONL logging requirements per 1n78.35

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
